mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(total_price), 0) AS totalSales, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM members WHERE deleted_at IS NULL) AS memberCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stores WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND close_time > CURTIME()) AS activeStoreCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stores) AS totalStoreCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE order_status IN ('PAYMENT_COMPLETED', 'PICKUP_COMPLETED') AND DATE(created_at) = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AS yesterdayOrderCount, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_price), 0) FROM orders WHERE order_status IN ('PAYMENT_COMPLETED', 'PICKUP_COMPLETED') AND DATE(created_at) = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AS yesterdaySales, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM members WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)) AS newMemberThisWeek FROM orders WHERE order_status IN ('PAYMENT_COMPLETED', 'PICKUP_COMPLETED') AND DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()

SELECT DATE(created_at) AS saleDate, COUNT(*) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(total_price),0) AS totalSales FROM orders WHERE order_status IN ('PAYMENT_COMPLETED', 'PICKUP_COMPLETED') AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY saleDate ASC

SELECT s.category AS category, COUNT(o.id) AS orderCount FROM orders o JOIN stores s ON o.store_id = s.id WHERE o.order_status NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'CANCELED') GROUP BY s.category ORDER BY orderCount DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE stores SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{storeId}
UPDATE stores SET deleted_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{storeId}
UPDATE reviews SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{reviewId}
UPDATE complaints SET admin_reply = #{adminReply}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{complaintId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO complaints (reporter_id, complaint_type, title, content, status) VALUES (#{reporterId}, #{complaintType}, #{title}, #{content}, 'PENDING')
